Quality Education.reason: As a university foundational course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops fundamental analytical skills for future employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 此課程為大學中眾多科系(如理工類科系、商管類科系等)的基礎課程
學生可以學習微積分的基礎知識與計算技巧以及基本的數學分析能力

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops foundational analytical and problem-solving skills, which are prerequisites for innovation and technological upgrading in many economic sectors, indirectly supporting Target 8.2.
evidence: 培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
培養基礎數學與邏輯推理之能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course builds core competencies in mathematical modeling and scientific computing, which are essential tools for enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 培養建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
培養數理資訊與科學計算之能力
